name: binclusive-accessibility-skills
description: Binclusive accessibility mapping, audit, and remediation skills for web, React Native, iOS, native Android, and Flutter projects.

interface.description: Map React/Next.js, React Native/Expo, ASP.NET/ASPX, iOS SwiftUI/UIKit, native Android (Jetpack Compose / Android Views/XML), and Flutter (Dart, Material/Cupertino) projects, audit accessibility issues, and fix selected audit tasks with controlled verification.
